ogTitle: Sawyers Valley vs Scaddan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sawyers Valley and Scaddan.
heading: Sawyers Valley vs Scaddan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sawyers Valley, Western Australia and Scaddan, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sawyers Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Scaddan (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sawyers Valley or Scaddan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sawyers Valley has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Scaddan scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sawyers Valley scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Scaddan scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sawyers Valley or Scaddan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sawyers Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
